program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Holding a problem-solving meeting when the study samples arrive late -- describing the issue and agreeing a solution with should and suggestions -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 15 -- Problem-Solving Meetings
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 15 -- Problem-Solving Meetings

listenings.text: Hi Sarah, this is Fernando. We have an issue with the study. The samples arrived late, and this is a real problem for the team. The cause is a delay at customs. I think we should meet today to find a solution. We need to decide on the next steps. Please call me back. Thank you.

Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. I have a suggestion for the late samples. Why don't we use the local lab this week? That is a good option to fix the delay. We could also call the supplier to solve the main cause. I think we should decide today. This challenge is not so big. Let's talk soon.
